first_run.rationale: The change in company names from specific entities like 're:cinq' and 'Optilyz' to generic ones like 'Acme Software' and 'Pinepoint Systems' had no material effect on the evaluation. Both the baseline and variant evaluations gave the same score (2/10) for the exact same, overriding reasons: the candidate lacks the mandatory Japanese language proficiency and the required deep experience in embedded C and L2/L3 networking. The minor variations in phrasing between the two reports are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in the core assessment.
